title: CAF urbos pack [MTR4]
description: This pack add european transport véhicule like caf urbos 3
body:
CAF Urbos 3 – European Tramway
The CAF Urbos 3 is a modern low-floor tram designed by CAF (Construcciones y Auxiliar de Ferrocarriles). Modular, accessible, and realistic, it operates on many European and international networks.
Example cities:
France (Bensençon, Marseille), Belgium (Ostend, flandre, liège), Italy (bologne), Spain (Seville), United Kingdom (Birmingham), Sweden (Stockholm), Norway (Oslo), Portugal (Lisbon), Netherlands (Utrecht), Finland (Helsinki), Mauritius.
Planned updates:
additional CAF Urbos 3 variants
addition of the CAF Urbos 100
upgrade to a European Tramway Pack
Realistic sounds, inspired by real CAF tramways.
 CAF-Straßenbahnen.
